calendar.matters:
Status Hearing Re Distribution Of Funds (Per Jun-25-2019 Order)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James C. Bridgman, esq. (415-296-9812) of Aspelin + Bridgman LLP for Claimant: Kiefer.
No other appearances.

Not argued. Mr. Bridgman presents a proposed order allowing distribution of funds to administrator of decedent's estate.

Status Hearing Re Distribution Of Funds (Per Jun-25-2019 Order): Order is signed. (See Scanned Order for Details.)

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Allow Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Administrator Of Decedent'S Estate Pursuant To Civil Code 2924ka4 And Distribution Of Funds To The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Zahradka (appearing via court call), Esq. of Tiffany & Bosco, 619-501-3503, appearing for National Default, Plaintiff.

James Bridgman, Esq. of Aspelin & Bridgman LLP, 415-296-9812, appearing for Renata Kiefer, for Claimant and moving party.

Hearing held. The Court stated that it had reviewed the probate file and spoke to a probate examiner. Mr. Bridgman provided case background and stated that the funds would be placed in a blocked account.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT RENATA KIEFER MOTION To Allow Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Administrator Of Decedent'S Estate Pursuant To Civil Code 2924ka4 And Distribution Of Funds To The Estate is GRANTED. The Court shall release the funds upon filing of a bond of cash plus the estimated annual income on the proceeds with the probate court. A status hearing will be set for July 26, 2019. If the Claimant is not bondable, the Court will distribute the funds to a blocked account. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Allow Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Administrator Of Decedent'S Estate Pursuant To Civil Code 2924ka4 And Distribution Of Funds To The Estate

Osc Re: Why Counsel For Ms. Herman, Steve Gohari And Olympia Law, P.C. Shall Not Be Sanctioned For Making This Claim In Light Of Pending Probate Proceedings (Issues With Probate Proceedings Are Addressed In The Petition Placing Counsel On Notice)
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kelsey Solberg, 213.725.5300 for Claimant Herman Holley.
No other appearances.

Osc Re: Why Counsel For Ms. Herman, Steve Gohari And Olympia Law, P.C. Shall Not Be Sanctioned For Making This Claim In Light Of Pending Probate Proceedings (Issues With Probate Proceedings Are Addressed In The Petition Placing Counsel On Notice:

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: No OSC. The claimant is deceased. Counsel will withdraw the claim. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Hearing Regarding Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Megan Lees, 619.501.3503 for Petitioner National Default Servising Corporation.
(Via Court call)

James Bridgman, 415.296.9812 who is counsel of record in a related probate case informs the Court that teh Claimant Herman Holley is deceased.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Hearing Regarding Surplus Funds
is Holley Herman's claim is DENIED. Ms. Herman fails to provide any authority or evidence of entitlement to the distribution. The Court sets a hearing for December 14, 2018 for Ms. Herman's counsel of record to address why the Court should not issue an OSC Re: Why Counsel for Ms. Herman, Steve Gohari and Olympia LAW, P.C. shall not be sanctioned for making this claim in light of pending probate proceedings (issues with Probate Proceedings are addressed in the Petition placing counsel on notice). Response shall be filed and served no later that December 12, 2018. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS.

Appearances: Elena Nutenko of Olympia Law PC (213.725.5300) appearing via Court Call for claimant Herman Holley; No other appearances.

Ms. Nutenko informs the Court she had filed a claim on behalf of her client yesterday. As of yet, the claim had not been accepted for filing. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. No claims on file. The Court indicates it will inform the clerk's office to re-set the matter for hearing when a claim is filed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
